findingDetails.claim: Live prompt-improver agent metadata can preserve or emit the removed /prompt command/path instead of /prompt-improve.
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: Checked .opencode/commands/prompt*.md discovery and the live command file; only prompt-improve.md exists and it reads the nested packet.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: An undocumented /prompt alias could exist outside the markdown command tree, but the approved spec explicitly selected a rename rather than alias retention.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade to P2 if a current command router intentionally aliases /prompt to /prompt-improve and documents that compatibility for agent handoff inputs.

findingDetails.claim: prompt-models README includes stale top-level paths that fail if followed literally.
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: Read README context and parent hub scope; the nested prompt-models packet is current in-scope path.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: The missing sk-prompt segment may be a typo rather than a migration miss; copied commands still fail.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade to an advisory note if .opencode/skills/prompt-models is an intentional compatibility link.

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: Spec-folder review spans phase docs, skill hub files, command surface, runtime agents, and benchmark artifacts.

targetSelection.selectionReason: Correctness pass prioritized live routing and handoff surfaces most likely to contradict the completed rename/fold-in contract.
omittedHighRiskTargets: full benchmark tree historical changelogs excluded from active stale-reference classification
targetSelection.graphStatus: stale: code graph readiness requires full_scan after git HEAD change; exact Grep/Read fallback used
targetSelection.semanticSearchStatus: not_used: exact command/path tokens were known

searchLedger.hypothesis: Agent handoff metadata still names the removed /prompt command after the command rename.

searchActions.result: live agent surfaces still cite /prompt and .opencode/commands/prompt.md
live command reads nested prompt-improve packet

searchLedger.rationale: The command file moved and the live command is corrected, but both runtime agents preserve stale integration metadata.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Nested prompt-models README still contains top-level path examples from a prior layout.

searchActions.result: quick-start and validation examples point at .opencode/skills/prompt-models

searchLedger.rationale: The approved and actual packet path includes sk-prompt/prompt-models, but README examples omit the hub segment.

searchLedger.invariant: Parent hub routes through mode-registry.json to prompt-improve and prompt-models without flattening packet behavior.

searchActions.result: hub describes registry-driven routing and loads packet SKILL.md by registry packet
two workflow modes registered with expected packets and command null for prompt-models
router has prompt-improve default and prompt-models signal classes

searchLedger.rationale: No router-shape correctness mismatch found in this slice.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: Direct reads show registry and router match the approved two-workflow-mode contract.

title: Prompt-improver agents still route integration metadata to removed `/prompt` command
prompt-models README quick-start and verification commands point at a non-existent top-level skill path

detail: Prompt-improver agents still cite removed /prompt command path while spec and live command use /prompt-improve.
Terminal stale-reference sweep claims clean live references but exact command-token search found live agent stale refs.

reason: Direct reads of hub SKILL.md, mode-registry.json, and hub-router.json match the approved two-workflow-mode routing contract.
